summary: unit_status (大樓維修/MBIS) flow verified end-to-end on live backend: PM created a 5-室 leaf (all pending), assigned 判頭 ticked fixed/fixing (actual stays 0 — only signed_off counts), PM signed off 2 rooms -> actual_progress=40, floors_completed exactly mirrors the signed-off labels, and both history rows carry the full label_status map so the tick1->tick2 diff (fixed→signed_off etc) is derivable. Denials correct: un-assigned 判頭 and worker get 0-row PATCH + 42501 on history insert; worker hidden by get_visible_progress_items. One nuance: the contributor visibility narrowing is RPC-only — a worker can still read any progress_items row (incl. label_status) by direct table SELECT. Cleanup complete (item deleted, history cascaded).

bugs.title: Contributor visibility narrowing bypassable via direct table SELECT on progress_items
bugs.repro: As 60001006 (subcontractor_worker, approved member, NOT assigned): GET /rest/v1/progress_items?id=eq.<item> returns the row (incl. label_status), while POST /rpc/get_visible_progress_items returns 0 rows for the same user.
bugs.evidence: us-wk-sel.json = 1 row vs us-vis-wk.json = []. v3-progress-schema.sql SELECT policy is can_view_project (any approved member); narrowing to assigned/delegated rows lives only in get_visible_progress_items (v27).

bugs.title: DB accepts arbitrary actual_progress/status/floors_completed from any assigned contributor (no server-side recompute from label_status)
bugs.repro: As an assigned 判頭, PATCH progress_items with actual_progress=100,status=completed and label_status untouched — DB accepts; %/mirror derivation (unitStatusToProgress) is client-side only. Cross-mode issue (floors/quantity identical), not unit_status-specific.
bugs.evidence: updateUnitStatus in src/contexts/ProgressContext.tsx materialises actual/floors_completed client-side; no trigger/constraint ties actual_progress to label_status in supabase/v44-progress-unit-status.sql.

improvements.title: MBIS/MWIS 法定限期 countdown + 屋宇署命令編號 field on 大樓維修 items (距法定限期 X 日 KPI, red when <30日)
improvements.why: A real MBIS order has a statutory compliance deadline; the PIC prioritises by 距期, but the item only has planned_start/planned_end and no BD order ref, so the legal clock lives outside the app.

improvements.title: Per-室 defect detail: defect description, photo evidence and RI sign-off identity per label
improvements.why: Dispute trail today only proves 'whole-map tick by whom at when'; a surveyor challenge of 邊個簽收咗15/F A室、有冇相佐證 cannot be answered per-unit — photos can only hang off the item or notes.

improvements.title: 待覆檢 (reinspect) worklist/filter — the RI's daily queue
improvements.why: unitStatusCounts surfaces only 簽收/修復/共; the state the RI actually plans his覆檢 round from is 'reinspect', and there is no list or filter of those 室 across floors.

improvements.title: Bulk state actions in the unit_status editor (全層設為..., multi-select 室)
improvements.why: Chip cycles 5 states in order, so pending→signed_off is 4 taps per 室; a 200-室 tower means hundreds of taps on a phone in the corridor.

improvements.title: Prompt assignment (assigned_to) when creating a unit_status item / warn when 0 assignees
improvements.why: RLS makes an unassigned register invisible and untickable to the 判頭; nothing in CreateItemModal tells the PM, so the gap only surfaces when the 判頭 phones to ask why he sees nothing.
